[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 0010011 3
1 0100100 2
2 0010010 2
3 1100111 5
4 0110111 5
5 1111011 6
6 1011100 4
7 0010000 1

01 10 0000011 2
12 21 0011011 4
23 32 1011100 4 match 6
34 43 0010000 1 match 7
45 54 0000001 1
56 65 0100100 2 match 1
67 76 0100010 2
70 07 1000011 3

02 20 1000111 4
13 31 0111000 3
24 42 0010011 3 match 0
35 53 0100100 2 match 1
46 64 0010010 2 match 2
57 75 0100001 2
60 06 0000110 2
71 17 0101011 4

03 30 1000100 2
14 41 0010011 3 match 0
25 52 0000101 2
36 63 0110100 3
47 74 0000011 2
50 05 0000101 2
61 16 0110010 3
72 27 1001011 4

04 40 0000011 2
15 51 0100001 2
26 62 0010110 3
37 73 1101000 3
